title: Add offline session list JSON
goal: Implement the first issue #4 slice by adding an offline, read-only `jcode-harness session list --json` command with deterministic schema and docs.
requiredInputs: Issue #4 headless orchestration API roadmap mentions `jcode session list/spawn/attach/resume --json`
permissions: Modify source, tests, docs, and local .codex-harness governance files
Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build/reload
completionConditions: `jcode-harness session list --json` exists and is read-only/offline
Focused e2e validates parseable output and expected fields
Repository is formatted, checked, committed, and pushed
failureTaxonomy: CLI shape conflicts with existing command tree
Session storage discovery is more complex than expected
Test flakiness from environment-dependent session files
notes: Keep first slice conservative: list local/discovered sessions only, no spawn/attach/resume mutation.
